coreIssue: This growth conversation is likely about whether Maria has a usable path beyond Principal after being passed over and how that is affecting her engagement.
openingQuestion: What would make the path beyond Principal feel concrete again, including any feedback or scope you still need from the last cycle?
listenFor: whether she names a specific part of the promotion decision that still feels unclear
whether if she describes mentoring, she frames it as building next-level scope or as work that feels safer right now
whether she volunteers a concrete change in how she shows up in rituals since the last cycle
avoid: do not open by defending the promotion decision before you know what readout she actually received
do not treat mentoring as automatically positive strategic work without testing what role it is playing for her
goodOutcome: You and Maria have agreed what next-level scope beyond Principal means for her and one concrete area where she wants clearer feedback or ownership.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, gather the exact feedback and decision rationale Maria was given last cycle so you can confirm facts instead of speaking from memory.
